allow: PowerShell($dir = "build\\windows\\x64\\runner\\Release"; $exe = Join-Path $dir "md_reader.exe"; $i = Get-Item $exe; Write-Output \("EXE: {0}" -f $i.FullName\); Write-Output \("Size: {0:N1} MB" -f \($i.Length/1MB\)\); Write-Output "--- Bundle contents ---"; Get-ChildItem $dir | Select-Object Mode, Length, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)
